description: A passenger whose bag was delayed is calling for a status update. An agent must check the tracking system.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the passenger's mishandled baggage report using their name or file reference number.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the existing claim file.

nodes.task_description: Check the baggage tracking system for the latest updates on the bag's location.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the bag has been located and is scheduled to arrive on the next flight.

nodes.task_description: Inform the passenger of the update and confirm their delivery address for when the bag arrives.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides a clear update and confirms delivery details.
